nodes.itemHTML: • SAILstars48 - Easy-to-use cross-platform image decoding library with pluggable image codecs. [MIT]
• Multilayer Social Networks, by Mark E. Dickison, Matteo Magnani and Luca Rossi (2016).

• uunet - Tools for multilayer social networks.
    • Related book and data. See multinet for the R version.

• multinet - Tools for multilayer social networks.
    • Related book and data, and presentation article. See uunet for the Python version.
• Tables for Laravelstars109 - Provides a DataTable component with integration for Laravel Query Builderstars2.9k.

• Turbo Rascal Syntax Error - Complete suite (IDE, compiler, programming language, resource editor) intended for developing games/demos for 8 / 16-bit line of computers, including the Game Boy and Game Boy Color.
• Beaniestars116 - Asynchronous ODM based on Motor and Pydantic, which supports migrations out of the box

nodes.itemHTML: • The Lion, The Witch, and The Wardrobe 🌟 🔥

• The Colour of Magic [3.9] This is the first book of the series Discworld. The books can be read in order or independently. There are several narrative threads that cross quite often creating a funny and enjoyable reading experience.

    I love this book. The style is original and hilarious and the characters' personality is deeply developed. Death alone is a good reason to read this book. - @fourlastor
• Mort [4.2] This was my intro to Discworld, and I loved it. Death is hilarious. - @RichardLitt
• Making Money [4.2] How Terry Pratchett consistently came up with good stories is beyond me. This one is also good, particularly for how TP envisions banks and automatons. - @RichardLitt
• AWS Key Management Service (KMS) - Amazon AWS - Create and manage cryptographic keys in AWS.
• AWS Secrets Manager - Amazon AWS - Securely store retrievable application secrets in AWS.
• HCL AppScan Source ©️ - Commercial Static Code Analysis.
• Softwaretalks Newsletter. In Softwaretalks Newsletter, we send articles about software engineering every Thursday. (For persian users).
• Whatlang.org - An interactive demo for whatlang (language recognition library).

• Building BPF applications with libbpf-bootstrap - Helps generate minimal or advanced templates to bootstrap your own applications (kernel side and user space management for maps and programs) with features like CO-RE, global variables, and ring buffer.
• libbpf-bootstrapstars82 - Scaffolding for BPF application development with libbpf and BPF CO-RE.
